features.evidence: Battery health is at 86% with a relatively high cycle count, which is still within Amazon Renewed standards. The performance is super fast, the camera quality is amazing as expected and the battery life has been great for daily use.

The screen, frame, and camera lenses are in great shape, with only a very slight cosmetic mark that’s barely noticeable, especially once a case is on. It arrived in excellent condition, no noticeable scratches on the screen or body, and it honestly looks almost brand new.setup was quick and everything works perfectly.
value: display pixel density: 460 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)
